feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Readiness Check
feed.subtitle: SAP Readiness Check Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Readiness check S/4HANA 2023 - Priority 1 messages for every access to catch weight specific fields
entry.content:
Hi,
we are upgrading from S/4HANA 1809 to 2023 at the moment. After having upgraded our dev system to S/4HANA 2023 we had executed the readiness check with the new check variant for 2023 (S4HANA_READINESS_2023 after uploading the latest simplification DB). We're using catch weight functionality in our systems and now we've recognized, that the atc results are containing a message with priority 1 for every access to the catch weight fields (for example MARA-/CWM/XCWMAT, LIPS-/CWM/LFIME or LIPS-/CWM/PIKMG).
The message details i.e. are:
Functionality not available: no functional equivalent (TABL LIPS, see Note(s): 0002296016)
Finding can be suppressed with pseudo comment "#EC CI_USAGE_OK[2296016]
Referenced Object: LIPS (TABL)
Additional Info: DTAB - Referenced object type is a database table /LIPS-/CWM/PIKMG
Referenced Application Component: XX-SER-REL
Change Category of Piecelist Items: T (Technical)
SAP Note Number: 0002296016 (SAP S/4HANA custom code adaptation - removal of orphaned objects)
Simplification Item Category: A (Functionality not available: no functional equivalent)

I don't understand why such messages occur, cause I don't have any information about catch weight functionality is getting obsolet in S/4HANA 2023.

Are these messages false positives or is it a bug of the readiness check for S/4HANA 2023?
Is there any possibility to avoid such messages (without excluding note 2296016 as it seems to be very generic note)?

Thanks & regards
Daniel

entry.title: SAP Readiness check for IBP
entry.content: Is there SAP readiness check from APO to IBP for upgrade from ECC to S4 Hana

entry.title: S4/HANA Migration Project ATC Check: S/4HANA: Search for Usages of Simplified Object , LFA1
entry.content:
Hello,

We have ATC Check report to analyze the custom code. we got check message with Priority 1 and check message. sap note 2296016 information is not enough to adapt the change or replaced object.

S/4HANA: Search for Usages of Simplified Objects
Functionality not available: no functional equivalent2296016REMOVAL OF TECHNICAL APPLICATION ANALYSISTABLLFA1DTAB - Referenced object type is a database table

any input how to adapt the code for such ATC checks.?

Thanks..!

Regards

entry.title: S/4HANA Readiness check does not provide quickfix in eclipse result browser
entry.content:
Hey there!

 

The main poblems seems to be that the function "Analyze Result in ATC Problems View" (right click on check run in ATC result browser, described in Semi-automatic custom code adaptation after SAP S/... - SAP Community) does not work properly. 

If we click this function, we only get:

We can click on a check run result, right-click on recheck and then the check will be displayed in the ATC problems view. But only for the selected entry. 

I expect that "Analyze Result in ATC Problems View" works properly.

What are we missing/ doing wrong so that the quickfixes are not available at first?

Thanks in advance
 ~Enno

entry.title: The uploaded file is inval. Verify that the file has been downloaded using the SAP Readiness Check
entry.content:
We are creating the SAP HANA Readiness Check for a Customer but we have the following message when upload the File .ZIP to the portal.

  • The analysis has failed. Please try again.
  • The uploaded file is invalid. Verify that the file has been downloaded using the SAP Readiness Check data collector report.

All Jobs finished completly

I ran the program several times more, but when I upload the file the message is the same.

Some one got the same result???  

How can I fix this issue??

Can you Help me please??

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: Clarification of Note Implementation process for S/4 HANA Readiness check report.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Is it mandatory to implement Notes in development system first or can we directly go with deployment in production?


Thanks & Regards.

*
**


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Copy ST03N data with program in the SAP note 2568739 failed with error "Error in Control Framework"
entry.content:
We applied the note 2568739 as well as the Zreport in the note, however when running the program in the background job mode it failed with error:

Job started   
Step 001 started (program ZTMW_RC_MANAGE_ST03N_DATA, variant &0000000000000, user ID xxx ) 
Object ZTMW_RC_MANAGE_ST03N_DATA of class RE and language EN does not exist.   
Error in Control Framework      FES          022          E
Job canceled after system exception ERROR_MESSAGE   


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.content:

We are upgrading our system on BW/4 PERSON_NAME DIGITS to BW/4 PERSON_NAME DIGITS.
Could you please confirm if readiness check is supported/required for BW/4 PERSON_NAME upgrades.

entry.title: Problem when uploading SAP HANA Readiness Check
entry.content:
SAPSupport

We are creating the SAP HANA Readiness Check for a Customer but we have the following message when upload the File .ZIP to the portal.

  • The analysis has failed. Please try again.
  • The uploaded file is invalid. Verify that the file has been downloaded using the SAP Readiness Check data collector report.

All Jobs finished completly

I ran the program several times more, but when I upload the file the message is the same.

Some one got the same result???  

How can I fix this issue??

Can you Help me please??

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: Question regarding enabling the Extended Integration Impact Analysis for SAP Readiness Check
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are working to execute SAP Readiness Check and prepare to migrate to S/4HANA.

It shows that 3061414 - Enabling extended integration impact analysis for SAP Readiness Check can not be installed on our system. Is there a workaround to import this note?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BW HANA Sizing - Results interpretation /SDF/HANA_BW_SIZING
entry.content:
How should the results of the report /SDF/HANA_BW_SIZING be interpreted? is the recommended physical memory per node the final "HANA DB size" also displayed in the Readiness check report? It is very confusing as the sum of the memory 838 GB + data 1271 GB + log 512 GB disk size, is not equal to the recommended physical memory per node (1536 GB). 

Thanks for any clarification.

entry.content:
We are looking to migrate our SAP to latest version so want for readiness check.

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Readiness for lower releases of S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

How to check Cloud Readiness for custom code in S/4 Hana  in the lower releases <= 1709?

There is no variant ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS or SAP_CP_READINESS?

Do we need to create a Custom Variant in SCI for cloud readiness?

ABAP Development SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility SAP Readiness Check 

@OlgaDolinskaja 

Regards,

entry.title: Simplification Item Check (SIC)のチェック対象
entry.content:
S/4HANA 2021から2023のバージョンアップを計画しており、
事前に影響分析を実施するため、Simplification Item Checkを実行し、出力結果を確認中です。

S/4HANA 2021には、MDG（SAP Master Data Governance）とEWMをenbededして利用しています。
enbededした製品も、Simplification Item Checkの対象になりますか。

3rdパーティーの製品はSimplification Item Checkの対象外だが、
追加コンポーネントとしてS/4HANA2021にインストールした場合は、SAP製品は、Simplification Item Checkの分析対象になると理解しています。
理解はあっていますでしょうか


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: /SDF/RC_START_CHECK 実施時の警告メッセージ
entry.content:
ご担当者様

いつもお世話になっております。

S/4HANA変換チェックを行うために、以下のノートを順次適用しました。
・DIGITS - S4TC - SAP S/4HANA 変換およびアップグレード ※バージョン109
・DIGITS - シンプル化項目チェック

上記を適用後にノート 2502552 のバージョンが１つ(109→110)上がりましたので、
バージョンが109の状態で/SDF/RC_START_CHECKを実施しましたところ、
ジョブログやスプールに警告メッセージが出力されました。
※詳細は添付ファイル「RC_NEW_CHECK_IN_JOBの警告エラー.xlsx」をご参照ください

質問：
１．下記のノート変更内容を見たら、/SDF/RC_START_CHECKの結果に影響するほどの変更ではないと思いますが、
　　ジョブログやスプールに出力された警告メッセージを無視して良いでしょうか？
・変更ログ
　バージョン 110: 2502552 の適用がエラーで中止された場合に、
　　　　　　　　　前提条件ノートを 1 つずつ適用するためのノートテキストの小規模な調整のみ

２．バージョン110の変更内容は/SDF/RC_START_CHECKの結果に影響する場合、
　　SNOTEにて2502552を再度ダウンロードして適用すれば良いでしょうか？
　　それともノート2399707 までもう１回適用する必要があるでしょうか？


以上、宜しくお願い致します。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Readiness Check Run for S/4HANA "FOUNDATION" System Upgrade to 2023
entry.content:
Hi All,

Need advise on SAP Readiness Check  run for upgrade to 2023 on-prem version of S/4HANA "FOUNDATION" only system. As per SAP Note# 3049197 it says that Readiness Check is only applicable for S/4HANA full stack systems but out-of-scope for S/4HANA Foundation systems.

So in that case-

Q1) Does it mean we do not need to do such a check at all for Foundation S4 systems w.r.t note 3049197 ?

Q2) Do we still need to do something "similar" to the readiness check for an Upgrade from a lower ABAP Foundation (say 1709 or 1809) to S/4HANA Foundation 2023 FPS01 version w.r.t note 3049197 ?

Q3) When SUM tool is run then for a S/4HANA Full stack system it will check for SI related items and blocks the Upgrade if those have not  resolved/decided prior to running of SUM, does it means similar is the case for S/4 Foundation systems as well when SUM is run ?

Q4) (Follow-on question to Q3), then instead of readiness check, do  we need still need to run SI checks outside of Readiness check for S4 Foundation upgrade, also do we need to check for  ATC Custom code  checks and are they mandatorily needed for S4 Foundation upgrade ?

 

Note# 3059197 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

15. Can I use SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades to evaluate an SAP S/4HANA Foundation environment?

SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades is designed to support full stack SAP S/4HANA systems. The analysis of SAP S/4HANA Foundation systems used for deploying SAP HANA-only Add-Ons is out of scope.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Regards,

Ashish
